agreed_direction: DIRECTION HAS CHANGED since your read. Your Bridge 8->1 read was correct for 2026-05-15..17 but is now SUPERSEDED. New big-picture direction (Junyan 2026-05-24): pivot from 'LLM stock-thesis only' to a COMPLETE SYSTEMATIC INVESTMENT OPERATION aimed at real capital, target ~20% annualized (honestly tested, NOT curve-fit). Architecture = quant-primary + LLM-thesis overlay: a systematic A-share strategy (screen->entry->size->risk->mgmt) is what gets 20yr-backtested; the multi-agent thesis engine becomes a conviction OVERLAY, forward-validated not backtested. Universe = A-share only. 做T/intraday = deferred to v2. Full spec: docs/strategy/SYSTEMATIC_STRATEGY_v0.md. State: STATUS.md now updated (read its new '▶ CURRENT DIRECTION' block first).
corrections_to_your_read: Your ratified_set + methodological_rules (E1>E2>E3>E4, Path-B, Rule-X, PASS taxonomy) are ACCURATE and must stay intact — keep them.

But the PRIMARY bridge is no longer Bridge 8->1 research-quality. It is now building the systematic execution + a CREDIBLE 20yr backtest (the trust-earning machine). The LLM research loop continues in parallel but is the overlay, not the main build.

Data cost question is RESOLVED: the 15000-pt account covers 20yr daily + PIT financials (ann_date) + delisted universe + index_weight at <=2000 pts each. Net new spend ¥0. The blocker was the hardcoded lookback caps in fetch_tushare.py, not entitlement. (Your STATUS.md staleness flag was correct — I have updated it.)
